commit.message:
Add README with architecture overview, setup, and API docs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Implement notification system with server cluster, workers, emulators, and load testing

- Notification server: REST API, input validation, template rendering, Redis caching, RabbitMQ routing
- Notification worker: 4 dedicated queue consumers (APNS/FCM/SMS/EMAIL) with retry logic
- Third-party emulator: simulates delivery services with 95% success rate
- Device emulator: receives notifications, WebSocket broadcast, REST stats
- Load client: seeds test data, multi-threaded load test with p95/p99 reporting
- Infrastructure: PostgreSQL, Redis, RabbitMQ, Prometheus, Grafana with pre-provisioned dashboard
- Docker Compose with service health checks and replicas
- 27 unit tests covering validation, services, controllers, consumers
- Component diagram in drawio format

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(model-3d): hide coplanar edges in HEMesh edge rendering

After split-face extrusion, wall faces share coplanar edges with
adjacent side faces. buildHEEdgeGeometry was rendering ALL topology
edges, including these coplanar ones, creating visible diagonal lines
across stair side faces. Now skips edges where both adjacent faces
have matching normals and lie on the same plane.

Also removes diagnostic logging from applyPushPull (kernel is stable).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Creator page overflow on mobile, move Runner snackbar above action bar

- Anchor fields now wrap properly on mobile with shorter labels
- ZUPT "added" badge uses dark-mode-friendly colors
- Runner snackbar positioned above docked action bar to keep controls visible

- Remove bni-ace.html, 3 member profiles, 2 event pages, 15 articles

Make wireframe pattern/action validation tolerant to prevent pipeline halt (#92)

Downgrade pattern/action validation failures from fatal errors to warnings
so the pipeline continues to the Integrator stage when wireframes are usable
but slightly deviate from strict pattern definitions.

- Replace throw with console.warn + break after retry exhaustion in wireframer
- Downgrade workflow grounding validation to warning
- Extract validateWireframeActions to shared validator module
- Expand tests from 2 to 13 covering tolerant validation contract

commit.message:
feat: major dashboard overhaul — launches ticker, trade log, manual sell, sparklines

Layout (grid):
- Portfolio box: 5r×7c (was 6r×8c) — tighter, more space below
- Market box: 3r×5c, P&L chart: 2r×5c — right column kept
- NEW Live Launches ticker: full-width row 6 — cycles through DexScreener
  discoveries every 10s showing symbol, mcap, age, buy/sell ratio, 1h %
- NEW Trade Log panel: left of decisions box — persistent chronological
  feed of every executed trade with side/asset/amount/status
- Claude Decisions: 4r×8c (right side) — same content, narrower

Portfolio table:
- 7 columns: Token | Balance | Price | Value | Port% | P&L% | Trend
- Trend column: 8-char sparkline (▁▂▃▄▅▆▇█) from real-time price history
- Price cell flashes green/red for 2.5s when price changes (doChartRefresh)
- POSITIONS sub-section below TOTAL: shows hold time + next target per position
  e.g. "MIRABEL  held 4m  entry $0.000059  next: +50%"

Status bar:
- [s] key hint added
- Live launch count (e.g. "15 launches") + session trade count

New [s] key — manual sell:
- Shows dropdown of current non-reserve positions with values
- Confirmation prompt in status bar with 5s countdown
- Calls new POST /force-sell endpoint — bypasses Claude, direct execution

Server:
- GET /launches → fetchNewLaunches() results (cached 60s by DexScreener module)
- POST /force-sell → takes { symbol }, builds sell decision, calls executeDecision()

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: resolve Prisma 7 driver adapter compatibility issues

- Override getUserByAccount in auth adapter to use findFirst instead of
  findUnique with compound keys, which fails with Prisma 7 driver adapters

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: show all 3 trades (XAU/NAS100/BTC) every weekday in history

Bug1 (critical): calc_pnl midnight wraparound — at 00:00-08:59 BJ,
NAS100/BTC (entry_start=21:00) incorrectly returned 'pending' because
bj_hm (0-540) < entry_hm (1260). The 03:30 snapshot therefore saved
both as pnl=0. Fix: add _is_entry_pending() with cross-midnight check.

Bug2: _range_tracker had the same midnight wraparound, excluding
NAS100/BTC from P&L range tracking overnight. Fix: use _is_entry_pending.

Bug3: _startup_finalize_history used full-day daily OHLC for all
instruments, so BTC could show +1.25% if TP was hit at any point during
the calendar day (not just the 21:00-03:00 entry window). Fix: use 1h
data sliced to entry window (entry_start BJ → 03:00 BJ); store
entry_start/entry_end in strategy_cache.json for reconstruction.

Bug4: scheduler at 21:00 BJ only rebuilt XAU NY backup signal; NAS100
and BTC kept their 15:00 estimated ORB levels all day. Fix: call
build_strategies() at 21:00 so all three get real NY-session data.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Configure prisma.config.ts to read from .env.local and use DIRECT_URL
for migrations. Add @types/pg for type safety. Include initial migration
for Auth.js and domain models.

- Respect explicit depthtest/depthwrite from material JSON instead of

- Support alternate WE spellings: depthtesting/depthwriting

Camera shake: use raw shake offset for perspective cameras (world-space
translation) vs ortho-scaled offset for 2D wallpapers.

Add shader source and M+VP matrix diagnostic logging.

fix: missing resolve_tags import killed poll loop, freezing extraction UI

resolve_tags was used in dynamic_output.py but never imported. When partial
vocab results arrived, the NameError crashed _poll_queue's Tkinter callback,
permanently killing the polling loop. The worker subprocess kept running fine
but the GUI was deaf to all further messages — appearing frozen on "YAKE
extraction in progress..." indefinitely.

- Add missing resolve_tags import to dynamic_output.py
- Add catch-all Exception handler in _poll_queue so one bad message logs
  the error instead of killing the entire polling loop

commit.message:
Fix depth buffer clear for RADV GFX1201 (AMD RX 9070 XT)

Render pass loadOp=CLEAR does not reliably clear depth attachments on
RADV GFX1201, leaving garbage values that cause all fragments to fail
the depth test (making 3D models invisible).

Replace loadOp=CLEAR with explicit vkCmdClearDepthStencilImage before
the first depth-enabled render pass each frame:
- Add ClearDepthStencilImage to Vulkan dispatch table and CommandBuffer
- Transition depth image UNDEFINED → TRANSFER_DST → DEPTH_STENCIL_ATTACHMENT
- All render passes use LOAD for depth (clear already done)
- Per-frame g_depth_transitioned flag reset in VulkanRender
- Add TRANSFER_DST_BIT to depth image usage flags
- Add first-frame execution trace logging for render passes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add Remotion visual pipeline architecture and mToolbar parity test suite

Remotion → AI → Fusion design-driven pipeline spec (docs/REMOTION_VISUAL_PIPELINE.md):

- Practical workflow: design in Remotion, AI extracts config, generator compiles .setting

mToolbar parity test suite (tests/test_mtoolbar_parity.py, 107 tests across 9 layers):
- Layer 1: Serializer round-trip fidelity (typed tables, ordered keys, expressions)
- Layer 2: All 43 node types from commercial template registry
- Layer 3: All 11 UserControl types (labels, buttons, sliders, combos, etc.)
- Layer 4: AnimEngine expression-based timing (channels, easing, passthrough)
- Layer 5: MotionVFX compatibility (drop zones, style switching, shapes)
- Layer 6: All 8 preset categories (pointers through transitions)
- Layer 7-8: .drfx packaging and end-to-end 60+ template pack generation

commit.message:
feat: expert-level scroll animation with bell curve crossfades

Completely rewrote CinematicScroll using animation best practices
for guaranteed visibility and smooth transitions.

ALGORITHM:
- Background: 5-point bell curve (0→0.4→1→0.4→0)
- Text: 4-point linear fade (0→1→1→0)
- Phone: Delayed sync (offset +5%)
- Overlap: 10% before/after each scene

VISIBILITY GUARANTEE:
Each scene visible from (sceneStart - 10%) to (sceneEnd + 10%)
Creating 20% overlap between adjacent scenes ensuring combined
opacity is always > 50% at any scroll position.

MATH PROOF (at 22% scroll between scenes 1 & 2):
- Scene 1 (0-25%): at 22%, opacity = ~0.3
- Scene 2 (25-50%): at 22%, opacity = ~0.7
- Combined: 1.0 (fully visible)

commit.message:
feat(guardrail): Section C — dbt AI Guardrail Framework

Merges feature/guardrail into main.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
WHAT THIS BUILD ADDS
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

A runtime AI guardrail system driven by dbt metadata and enforced by
Datap.ai across ALL AI use cases: Text2SQL, RAG, summarization,
explanation, narrative insight, agent tool calls, workflow triggering.

Architecture:
  warehouse / lakehouse   = hard enforcement (GRANT / RLS / column masking)
  dbt meta.datapai.*      = policy authoring (model + column governance)
  Datap.ai                = runtime compiler + guardrail executor

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
NEW: guardrail/ PACKAGE
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

metadata_schema.py
  - ModelAiPolicy (30+ fields), ColumnAiPolicy (20+ fields), AiPolicyCatalog
  - Enum types: AiAccessLevel, SensitivityLevel, AnswerMode, PiiClass,
    MaskingRule, ExportPolicy, RetrievalPolicy, SummarizationPolicy,
    ExplanationPolicy, RagExposure, AgentActionPolicy, RiskTier
  - Safe defaults: deny-by-default for all AI eligibility

policy_compiler.py
  - PolicyCompiler: dbt manifest.json → AiPolicyCatalog
  - Supports meta.datapai.* (namespaced) and meta.ai_* (flat) conventions
  - PII inference from column descriptions
  - explain_policy_decision(), get_allowed_assets_for_use_case()
  - In-process cache versioned by manifest MD5

validators.py
  - GuardrailResult dataclass with violations, blocked_models/columns,
    answer_mode, suggestion, policy_version
  - validate_sql_against_policy()      — dangerous keywords, model/column rules
  - validate_summary_against_policy()  — summarization policy
  - validate_retrieval_against_policy()— RAG exposure policy
  - validate_tool_action_against_policy() — agent tool + export policy
  - validate_ai_action_against_policy()   — general-purpose
  - Rule precedence: hard deny → PHI → PII → aggregate_only → masked →
    workspace/tenant → general allow (spec Section 18)

context_filter.py
  - filter_context(): removes denied tables, excludes ai_exposed=false
    columns, annotates PII/masking, injects aggregate-only directives
  - build_safe_schema_context(): builds policy-safe prompt context from catalog
  - Workspace- and tenant-aware filtering

governed_action.py
  - GovernedAction: 13-step governed AI action lifecycle
  - AiUseCase enum (16 use cases)
  - GovernedRequest / GovernedResponse dataclasses
  - governance_panel dict for Streamlit/OpenWebUI display

trace_helpers.py
  - GuardrailTracer: emits policy_catalog_loaded, context_filtered,
    policy_check_passed/failed, action_blocked, action_modified_for_safety
    into the existing TraceLedger (degrades to no-op if ledger absent)

streamlit_ui.py
  - render_governance_panel() — compact governance summary widget
  - render_blocked_response() — user-friendly block UI + safer alternatives
  - render_catalog_admin() / render_governance_tab() — full admin page

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
NEW: dbt AI GUARDRAIL AGENT
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

agents/dbt_guardrail_agent.py
  - DbtGuardrailAgent: extends BaseAgent + @tool registry pattern
  - Works with LLM (natural-language governance Q&A) or without
  - 11 registered @tool functions:
      guardrail_catalog_summary, guardrail_explain_model/column,
      guardrail_list_eligible_models/columns, guardrail_validate_sql,
      guardrail_validate_action, guardrail_build_safe_context,
      guardrail_refresh_catalog, guardrail_list_blocked_models,
      guardrail_list_restricted_columns

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
NEW: OpenWebUI MIDDLEWARE
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

agents/openwebui_guardrail_pipeline.py
  - Policy-aware OpenWebUI Pipeline: extracts tenant/workspace/user context,
    classifies use case, validates pre-generation, blocks or annotates
  - Appends governance status block to every response

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
dbt-demo GOVERNANCE METADATA (committed in dbt-demo repo dfb688a)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

full-jaffle-shop/ai_governance.yml: 7 models
  customers  — approved, certified, masked (PII: name/age)
  orders     — approved, certified, aggregate_only (financial)
  payments   — restricted, aggregate_only (PCI; finance workspace only)
  membership — approved, certified, full (all use cases)
  events     — internal, aggregate_only (behavioural, no RAG)
  users      — DENIED (identity table, access=private, hard deny)
  plan       — approved, certified, full (product catalog)

chinook/ai_governance.yml: 8 models
  stg_customer — restricted, PII excluded (name/email/phone hidden)
  stg_employee — critically restricted (PII + salary)
  stg_invoice  — approved, aggregate_only (financial)
  stg_track / stg_artist / stg_album / stg_genre — approved, public

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
TESTS + DOCS
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

tests/test_guardrail.py  — 78 tests, 100% passing
  TestMetadataSchema, TestPolicyCompiler, TestContextFilter,
  TestValidatorsSql, TestValidatorsOther, TestRulePrecedence,
  TestMultiUserPolicy, TestDbtDemoMetadata, TestGuardrailAgent

docs/build_log.md            — permanent cross-session build record
                               (Section B traceability + Section C guardrail)

commit.message:
EMI-143: Fix 6 task failure modes — transient errors, EPERM cleanup, state race, already-done detection, stale sessions (#140)

Fix 1: Expand isTransientGitError() to detect network/auth failures (DNS,
timeout, SSL, connection refused) instead of only DLL init and signal kills.
This engages the circuit breaker properly instead of burning retries.

Fix 2: Add backoff + give-up to EPERM cleanup — track failed removal attempts
per directory and stop retrying after 5 failures instead of spamming logs
every 10 minutes forever.

Fix 3: Add terminal state write guard — once a task reaches done/failed,
block further writeBackStatus calls to prevent race where "In Progress"
overwrites "Canceled" in Linear.

Fix 4: Delete node_modules before worktree removal on Windows, and rename
stuck directories to .trash-<timestamp> as fallback so worktree re-creation
isn't blocked.

Fix 5: Detect "already done" tasks — when Claude reports success but no
branch/PR exists, check output for "already complete/merged/satisfied"
patterns and mark task done instead of failed.

Fix 6: Fall back to fresh session on stale resume — when fix-phase resume
fails with "No conversation found", re-queue as ready without burning a
retry instead of cycling through all retries on the same dead session.

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: use absolute path for ENTRYPOINT to prevent container exit

修复容器启动失败问题，将 ENTRYPOINT 从相对路径 "kasmvnc-startup"
改为绝对路径 "/usr/local/bin/kasmvnc-startup"。

Docker 在使用 JSON 数组形式的 ENTRYPOINT 时不会通过 shell 执行，
无法解析相对路径，导致容器立即退出（ExitCode 1）且无日志输出。

同步修改了所有 4 个脚本（Bash/PowerShell，中文/国际版）以及仓库 Dockerfile。

commit.message:
Add MCP Apps inline audio player for TTS tools

Bump fastmcp to 3.x and register a ui:// resource that renders an
embedded audio player with playback controls and a download link.
Clients that support the MCP Apps extension see the player inline;
others fall back to the existing JSON URL response.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: qwen3-tts-mlx
repository.description: Qwen3-TTS on Apple Silicon via MLX

commit.message:
feat(installer): attempt dolt install interactively with sudo

Add installDolt(): on Linux runs sudo bash -c 'curl -L .../install.sh | bash'
with stdio:inherit so the user can enter their password interactively.
On macOS uses brew. Falls back to manual instructions on failure.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Flush-right align Ask AI button, prevent shrinking

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add markdown rendering support to learning content components

- Create markdown.tsx utility with parseMarkdown, MarkdownText, and
  MarkdownParagraph components for rendering **bold**, *italic*, and
  `code` syntax
- Update ConceptSection, SkillCard, ExamStrategy, and KeyTakeaways
  components to render markdown instead of raw text

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add server terminal logging, progress overlay, and activity log

Server terminal:
- All actions (start, stop, create, delete, rebuild, export, test)
  now print timestamped logs to the terminal
- build_for_rlbot and launch_test_game log each step
- Startup banner shows dashboard URL and bot directory

Dashboard:
- Progress overlay with spinner and step list for rebuild,
  build-for-rlbot, and test-game actions
- Activity log panel shows timestamped server events
- Build output shown in progress overlay on failure
- Escape key closes progress overlay

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: adaptive-strategy-rl
repository.description: Strategy-conditioned RL: teaching one neural network multiple play-styles via strategy-vector conditioning. POC on LunarLander, targeting Rocket League.

commit.message:
Fix weekend date detection range: range(5) -> range(8)

range(5) missed Saturday/Sunday when today is Mon-Wed
(e.g. Monday + 5 days = Saturday, but range(5) only checks +0~+4)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
